name: Werewolf's Curse
description: Beneath a full moon, this character's nature unravels into something primal and dangerous.

name: Natural Hunter
description: Born with an instinct for the hunt. Deadly against beast-type enemies.

name: Hemophiliac
description: Blood excites this character in ways that are difficult to explain.

name: Survivor's Bond
description: Having faced death together, this character is bound to their companions in a way that transcends ordinary loyalty.

name: Wanderer's Mark
description: The road has left its mark. This character feels at home nowhere and everywhere.
